calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:50am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant Jim Khorge, appears through counsel, Donald Bloom; Respondent, Kelly Barham and Camilee Idiaquez, appear in Pro Per.
Parties and witnesses are sworn. Appellants present their respective cases in the narrative, Mr. Bloom presents Appellants case. Theresa Keen appears as a witness for the Appellant.

10:50am
